📝 Office & Document Editing

Collaborative document, spreadsheet, and presentation editors — open source alternatives to Google Docs and Microsoft 365.

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Collaborative word processor.

Alternatives to Microsoft 365

Office suite in the cloud — Word, Excel, PowerPoint.

Electronic signatures and contract workflow.

Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

ONLYOFFICE

Open source office suite with excellent MS Office compatibility.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Collabora Online

Browser-based LibreOffice for collaborative editing.

License: MPL-2.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

CryptPad

End-to-end encrypted collaboration suite.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

LibreOffice

The classic open source office suite for desktop.

License: MPL-2.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

DocuSeal

Open source DocuSign alternative — e-sign your own PDFs.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆
